# cairn mcp

Start an MCP stdio server. Reads MCP frames from stdin, dispatches to the eight cairn verbs, writes responses to stdout. Blocks until stdin closes.

## Help

```text
Start an MCP stdio server. Reads MCP frames from stdin, dispatches to the eight cairn verbs, writes
responses to stdout. Blocks until stdin closes.

Usage: mcp

Options:
  -h, --help
          Print help
```
